mapper.insert: INSERT INTO virtual_daily_checkin (user_id, checkin_date, day_sequence, credits_awarded, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{checkinDate}, #{daySequence}, #{creditsAwarded}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT checkin_id, user_id, checkin_date, day_sequence, credits_awarded, create_time FROM virtual_daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date = #{date} LIMIT 1
SELECT checkin_id, user_id, checkin_date, day_sequence, credits_awarded, create_time FROM virtual_daily_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date = #{date} LIMIT 1
